headline: A Look At Live Nation (LYV) Valuation After Jury Verdict On Ticketmaster Anticompetitive Conduct
summary: Live Nation Entertainment (LYV) is back in focus after a US federal jury found the company and its Ticketmaster subsidiary engaged in anticompetitive conduct and illegally monopolized the live events industry. See our latest analysis for Live Nation Entertainment. The verdict has triggered a 1 day share price return of a 2.5% decline to US$156.56, but the stock still carries a 30 day share price return of 5.2% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 23.1%. As a result, longer term momentum...

headline: Live Nation Monopoly Verdict Puts Ticketing Power And Valuation In Focus
summary: A US federal jury has found Live Nation Entertainment and its Ticketmaster unit liable for anticompetitive conduct in the US live event ticketing market. The verdict concludes that the companies operated an illegal monopoly, opening the door to potential structural remedies and penalties. Live Nation has said it plans to contest the ruling, so the legal process and possible remedies are expected to extend over time. For investors tracking Live Nation Entertainment (NYSE:LYV), the verdict...

headline: Live Nation Entertainment’s Quarterly Earnings Preview: What You Need to Know
summary: Live Nation Entertainment is poised to report its FY2026 first-quarter earnings in the coming weeks, and analysts are forecasting a narrowing of losses.
